title: Tiffany Grant and Asuka
wikitext:
[]: Tiffany Grant and Asuka Post by DevRei17 » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:34 am Is it just me or does it seem like Tiffany Grant was and still is a little obsessed playing Asuka? (No, this has nothing to do with the massive Asuka collection she has.) I mean it's cool she likes playing her character, but she gets pissed when anyone makes the slightest crack about her (Asuka that is.) Also what's up with her always bad mouthing the other characters? In nearly every commentary track I heard her in, she bad mouths a character every time the focus wasn't on Asuka (ex: Calls Shinji a whiner (true, but still), flat out calls Rei a “bitch” (I heard this one somewhere.), etc, etc. Can you say someone stays in character 24/7? Tell me Ms. Grant, what did Rei do in the series to qualify her as a “bitch”? Better yet, what did she do to you, not Asuka, you. A fictional character none the less. (If my memory serves me correctly, didn't Rei try to give Asuka advice about piloting, only for Asuka getting mad and slapping Rei in the face and storming off, even though Rei was being nice to her?!) Anyways, I have nothing against her, but like AWL, she says (and sometime does) some things that tick me (and probably others) off a little.

[]: Post by scarmullet » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:48 am I'd say Evangelion ruined her career and drove her batshit insane, of couse she could be just like Asuka in real life as well. This tends to happen with actors and roles they like. Apparently Malcom McDonald isnt done playing Alex DeLarge. So much so that I recently found a picture of him dressed as Alex again. I give that a

[]: Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jan 01, 2010 1:48 am since you're new here, I feel obligated to inform you young padawan that Tiffany Grant is a sensitive subject in these here parts same goes for Matt Greenfield, Amanda Winn-Lee, etc. they are not liked or looked upon favorably by most here with rare exceptions so even though you seem to have similar feelings like most of us, just tread lightly on this topic... also, there are threads on Grant and the others I mentioned, so try to use the search function next time before opening a new topic and yeah, as you may notice in doing so, it's weird we don't automatically lock or delete threads after they haven't been touched in a month like most boards/forums on teh intrawebz, but that's how we roll

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Jan 01, 2010 2:01 am here's my take: somewhere down the line during the recording sessions of the dub, Tiffany had a run-in with a real-life Arael, which horribly mindraped her when she regained conscience, she was convince that she is, indeed, Asuka & has been that way since

[]: Post by scarmullet » Fri Jan 01, 2010 2:04 am Anyone know if she has kids? I'll bet she has three kids Kid 1: Asuka Kid 2: Langley Kid 3: Soryu

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri Jan 01, 2010 2:06 am scarmullet wrote: I'll bet she has three kids Kid 1: Asuka Kid 2: Langley Kid 3: Soryu

[]: Post by scarmullet » Fri Jan 01, 2010 2:10 am Can we make this into a thread for making fun of Tiffany Grant?
